title: Delete Property
content:
# Delete Property

Permanently delete an existing Property. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /properties/{property_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.properties.deleteProperty()
print(response)

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: Property `name`, also known as `property_name`, to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
